title: National Flag and Coat of Arms (Exemption) Instrument 2002
title_en: National Flag and Coat of Arms (Exemption) Instrument 2002
short_name: National Flag and Coat of A...

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: The Instrument may be cited as the National Flag and Coat of Arms (Exemption) Instrument 2002 and shall apply to the Tanzania Investment center referred to as TIC.

provisions.title: Exemption
provisions.content: Subject to paragraph 3, TIC is hereby exempted from application of subsection (1) of section 6 of the National Flag and Coat of Arms Act 1971.

provisions.title: Use of Coat of Arm
provisions.content: The TIC shall, for the purposes of its official business, use the National Coat of Arms as part of its emblem as indicated in the schedule to this Instrument.
